title: berula erecta var. incisa
intro: Berula erecta var. incisa, also known as Cut-leaved Water-clover, is a perennial aquatic or semi-aquatic plant belonging to the Apiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Berula erecta var. incisa include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Berula erecta var. incisa can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
